title: Cornbread
body:
Traditional Southern cornbread omits the sugar. Northern style adds it. Both have their defenders.

· 2 cups cornmeal
· 1 cup flour
· ¼ cup sugar (optional, Southern style omits)
· 1 tablespoon baking powder
· 1 teaspoon salt
· 2 eggs
· 1¼ cups buttermilk
· ¼ cup melted butter or bacon drippings

source.label: Hugo Ziemann & Mrs. F. L. Gillette · The White House Cook Book · 1887
source.ref: Hugo Ziemann & Mrs. F. L. Gillette · The White House Cook Book · 1887
